meaning: n.哇扬戏(印度尼西亚爪哇的一种古典木偶戏)
examples: But it is also an allusion to Semar, the most mystically enigmatic wayang character.
This, after all, is the land of the wayang, the shadow puppets that radiate magic and mystery.
President Suharto's New Order, for example, is fond of references to the Ramayana, the Hindu epic, and the tradition of wayang shadow puppetry.
